## Checklist

- [ ] APK builds without warnings
- [ ] No new androidx / Compose / Gradle dependencies
- [ ] No em dashes in code or docs
- [ ] If a new CLI was added: README CLI table updated, CLI-REFERENCE.md
      updated, 00-detect.sh updated, MainActivity bind added, layout
      button added, strings.xml updated
- [ ] If a module changed: tested on at least one real rooted device
- [ ] Changelog entry added under `## [Unreleased]`
